channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This area is in an appalling state. There are various bits of debris including broken glass. This needs an operative with a large broom to come and sweep the area properly and clear it away., 25th March
item.description:
As a council taxpayer I am totally disgusted with the way this part of our street is left unswept. Please rectify this asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Maple Crescent, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding across pavement unknown water, 25th March
item.description:
Flooding across pavement unknown water

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westhorne Avenue, Middle Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking pathway, 25th March
item.description:
Tree has blown down and is blocking the pathway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Spurling Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cross wind warning, 25th March
item.description:
Why is there no Cross wind warning on the bridge for motorbikes and high sided vehicles? For the last two days I've nearly been blown off my bike and out of lane into traffic. This is really dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canterbury Way, Stone, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 25th March
item.description:
Graffiti on grey utility box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One or 2 cars park here daily on the pavement obstructing pedestrians, 25th March
item.description:
Adjacent to Sequana Maritime offices but on the public footway , one car parks here daily and often all day obstructing pedestrians, especially impassable for anyone in a wheelchair or with a baby buggy

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Litter Bin, 25th March
item.description:
The litter bin at this bus stop needs emptying. Currently overflowing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes and rubbish flytipped on pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Boxes and other bits of rubbish have been dumped on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page Heath Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation, 25th March
item.description:
Badly kept gardens along Park Mead blocking the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Mead, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deceased fox, 25th March
item.description:
Deceased fox( poisoned) on footpath adjacent to Longlands Road Allotments and on the path leading into Longlands Recreation Ground If you walk in via gate on Longlands Road you will see fox on right hand side a few feet beyond the electric substation

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 110, Longlands Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere., 25th March
item.description:
Road and pavement needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Mead, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish along Park Mead., 25th March
item.description:
Road all along from Gwillam Close to Shorne Close is disgusting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Mead, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double yellow line parking, 25th March
item.description:
Cars are continually parked on the clear double yellow lines outside the primitive butcher restaurant. I have yet to see a single parking attendant issue a ticket. One rule for them and another for us.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Acacia Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights plumstead high street, 25th March
item.description:
Temp traffic lights opposite the garage on Bostall hill/plumstead high street stuck on red causing chaos.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant missed road cleaning, 25th March
item.description:
This kerb is constantly missed by the road sweeper and it very rarely goes up to the top of Dale Wood Road. It turns into Red Cedars Road and misses this kerb. The photo shows the missed sweep and the turn it takes into Red Cedars Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dale Wood Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos or plastic, 25th March
item.description:
There has been some asbestos or plastic dumped to the side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodside Avenue, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large piece of asbestos, 25th March
item.description:
Hazardous if moved/broken by the public

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
Bag of clothing/rubbish has been dumped on the pavement and is now being strewn across the street due to the stormy weather. Location is by the tree opposite the Vicarage, on the corner of the long driveway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lake Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in Dairsie Road approximately opposite no 58., 25th March
item.description:
Ive reported this hazard several days ago and still hasn't been repaired.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dairsie Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp, 25th March
item.description:
The street lamp outside no. 20 keeps is broken the bulb kept flicking but now totally out so If you go down the alley at side of 20 Epstein you are in complete darkness which is extremely dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chervil Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
